title: From Singapore to Vietnam: The 2026 Cross-Border Business & Investment Dialogue
metaDescription: An exclusive in-person briefing with WTP Advisory and Standard Chartered on Vietnam's 2026 regulatory shifts, tax incentives and cross-border investment opportunities for Singaporean investors.
about: Gain first-hand insights into Vietnam's major regulatory shifts for 2026 and what they mean for Singaporean investors. This exclusive in-person briefing brings together experts from WTP Advisory and Standard Chartered to deliver critical updates on tax incentives, market outlooks, and cross-border investment opportunities.
A must-attend session for businesses planning expansion into one of Asia's fastest-growing markets.

details.label: Venue
details.value: Ascentium Singapore Office, 39-06/10 Ocean Financial Centre, 10 Collyer Quay, Singapore

details.label: Format
details.value: In-person | Registration confirmation will be sent separately

details.label: Contact
details.value: Lok Kah Seng, Associate Director – Group Commercial

matters.heading: Why This Event Matters Now
body: Vietnam is entering one of its most significant regulatory transitions in a decade. Major updates across tax incentives, investment licensing, e-invoicing, payroll compliance, foreign ownership rules, and enterprise registration are fundamentally reshaping what foreign investors must prepare for in 2026.

For Singaporean and regional investors, staying ahead of these changes is no longer optional. It is essential for protecting operations, reducing compliance risks, and capturing early-mover advantages in one of Asia's fastest-growing markets.

Building on the strong engagement from our previous online event for Singaporean investors, this exclusive in-person briefing — organized by Ascentium — brings together senior representatives from WTP Advisory, Standard Chartered Vietnam, and Standard Chartered Singapore. This session will deliver the latest Vietnam market and FDI updates, with a deeper focus on newly announced tax incentives and policy developments that will directly impact investment decisions in 2026.

agenda.title: Vietnam Market Update
agenda.speaker: Standard Chartered Vietnam
agenda.desc: Key economic indicators, sector outlooks, and cross-border investment trends heading into 2026.

agenda.title: Vietnam's Investment Landscape: Challenges & Opportunities
agenda.speaker: Jack Nguyen, CEO, WTP Advisory
agenda.desc: Overview of market entry trends, regulatory hotspots, priority FDI sectors, and strategic expansion pathways.

agenda.title: Tax Incentives & Policy Developments 2025–2026
agenda.speaker: Jack Nguyen, CEO, WTP Advisory
agenda.desc: Essential updates on CIT rates, VAT and PIT changes, e-invoicing, UBO rules, and new government incentives.

agenda.title: SC Network: Connecting Corridors for FDI Growth
agenda.speaker: Standard Chartered Singapore
agenda.desc: How Standard Chartered supports cross-border financing, expansion, and Singapore–Vietnam capital flows.

bulletSections.heading: Who Should Attend
items: Singaporean SMEs and corporates planning Vietnam expansion
Companies reviewing upcoming policy impacts on existing operations

bulletSections.heading: Why Join This Closed-Door Session
items: First-hand insights from Vietnam's tax, policy, and market experts
Practical guidance for FDI strategy and risk mitigation
Access to Standard Chartered's regional banking corridor specialists
Networking with senior investors and cross-border operators
Seats are limited to ensure meaningful discussion and participant engagement

registration.heading: Secure Your Seat
registration.subtitle: Participation is free but strictly limited. Register now to reserve your place at this exclusive investor briefing.
